cli.args.adjust.description: Daidaici zaɓi ne gwargwadon darajar da yake yanzu. (Hakanan yana nuna sabuwar darajar, wadda za a iya takaita ta zuwa wasu iyaka.)
cli.args.cli-lang.description: Sanya harshen da CLI zai yi amfani da shi.
cli.args.get.description: Yana nuna darajar da ake da ita na wani zaɓi.
cli.args.profile.description: Bayanan saituna da za a yi amfani da su.
cli.args.set.description: Canza wani zaɓi zuwa takamaiman daraja. (Hakanan yana nuna sabuwar darajar, wadda za a iya takaita ta zuwa wasu iyaka.)
cli.description: Yi amfani da linzamin kwamfuta ba tare da amfani da hannu ba. Wannan CLI yana sarrafa manhajar Tracky Mouse da ke gudana. An yi shi ne domin wasu shirye-shirye na waje kamar tsarin umarnin murya domin kunna/kashe Tracky Mouse da daidaita saituna cikin gaggawa.
desktop.about.description: Kashe kwamfutarka da kyamarar yanar gizo.
desktop.about.title: Game da Tracky Mouse
desktop.importSettings.title: Shigo da saituna
desktop.menu.importBackupError: An kasa ajiye madadin saitunan da ake amfani da su kafin shigo da sabbi.
desktop.menu.importReadError: An kasa karanta fayil ɗin da aka zaɓa.
desktop.menu.toggleDevtools: Kunna/ kashe kayan aikin masu haɓakawa
desktop.menu.toggleScreenOverlayDevtools: Kunna/ kashe kayan aikin masu haɓakawa (Screen Overlay)
desktop.updater.errors.checkout: Ba a iya zazzage sabon sigar a ma'ajiyar git ta gida ba. Wataƙila kana da canje-canjen da ba a adana su ba.
desktop.updater.errors.fetch: Ba a iya samo sabuntawa daga git ba.
desktop.updater.errors.generic: An sami kuskure yayin sabuntawa daga git.
desktop.updater.errors.install: An kasa shigar da abubuwan da sabon sigar ke buƙata bayan zazzagewa daga git.
desktop.updater.updateAvailable.gitRepoN: Domin wannan ma'ajiyar git ce, ana iya ɗaukar sabuntawa kai tsaye.
desktop.updater.updateAvailable.message:
Sabuwar sigar Tracky Mouse tana samuwa: %0

A halin yanzu kana amfani da sigar %1.
desktop.updater.updateAvailable.title: Sabuntawa ya samu
desktop.updater.updateFailed.title: Sabuntawa ta gaza
desktop.updater.updateSuccessful.message: An zazzage %0. Sake kunna manhajar don amfani da sabon sigar.
desktop.updater.updateSuccessful.title: Sabuntawa ta yi nasara
hud.pressToToggle: Latsa %0 don kunnawa ko kashe Tracky Mouse.
hud.willResumeAfterMouseStops: Zai ci gaba bayan linzamin kwamfuta ya daina motsi.
openCameraSettings.errors.parseKnownCame: An kasa warware bayanan kyamarori daga localStorage:
settings.cameraSource.description: Yana zaɓar wacce kyamara ake amfani da ita don bin diddigin kai.
settings.cameraSource.description.alt1: Zaɓi wacce kyamara za a yi amfani da ita don bin diddigin kai.
settings.cameraSource.label: Mabudin kyamara
settings.checkForUpdates.description: Idan an kunna wannan, Tracky Mouse zai duba sabuntawa da kansa lokacin da aka kunna shi.
settings.checkForUpdates.description.alt: Yana sanar da kai sabbin sigogin Tracky Mouse.
Yana sanar da kai idan sabon sigar Tracky Mouse ya fito.
settings.checkForUpdates.label: Duba sabuntawa
settings.clickingMode.description: Zaɓi yadda za ka yi danna linzamin kwamfuta.
settings.clickingMode.dwell.description: Riƙe sigifa a wuri na ɗan lokaci domin danna.
settings.clickingMode.dwell.label: Tsaya kaɗan domin danna
settings.clickingMode.label: Yanayin danna:
settings.clickingMode.off.description: Kashe danna. Yi amfani da shi tare da maɓallin waje ko shirye-shiryen da ke da nasu danna na tsayawa (dwell).
settings.clickingMode.off.label: Kashe
settings.clickingMode.openMouthIgnoringE: Buɗe bakinka sosai domin ka danna. Ba a la'akari da yanayin idanu.
Buɗe baki ka danna (ba tare da la'akari da idanu ba)
settings.clickingMode.openMouthSimple.de: Buɗe bakinka sosai domin ka danna. Aƙalla ido ɗaya dole ne ya buɗe kafin a danna.
settings.clickingMode.openMouthWithEyeMo: Buɗe bakinka sosai domin ka danna. Idan idon hagu ya rufe, danna dama ne; idan idon dama ya rufe, danna tsakiya ne.
Buɗe baki ka danna (tare da amfani da idanu)
settings.clickingMode.wink.description: Rufe ido ɗaya don danna. Idon hagu don danna hagu, idon dama don danna dama.
settings.clickingMode.wink.label: Kyalkyali don danna
settings.closeEyesToToggle.description: Idan an kunna wannan, zaka iya fara ko dakatar da sarrafa linzamin kwamfuta ta rufe idanuwanka biyu na ƴan daƙiƙu.
settings.closeEyesToToggle.label: Rufe idanu don farawa/tsayawa
settings.delayBeforeDragging.description:
Yana kulle motsin linzamin kwamfuta na wani ɗan lokaci a farkon danna.
Za ka iya kashe wannan idan kana zanen abu a kan allon zane, ko ƙara lokacin idan kana jin kana ja ba tare da niyya ba yayin danna.
Yana kulle motsin linzamin kwamfuta a farkon danna domin kauce wa ja ba da gangan ba.
settings.delayBeforeDragging.label: Jinkiri kafin ja
settings.headTilt.horizontalOffset.descr:
Yana gyara matsayin sigifa lokacin da kyamara ta ga kai na kallon gaba kai tsaye.
⚠️ Ba a ba da shawarar wannan karkacewar a kwance ba; idan zai yiwu ka matsar da kyamara maimakon haka. 📷
Yana gyara matsakaicin matsayi na lanƙwasawar kai a kwance. Ba a ba da shawarar hakan ba; idan zai yiwu ka matsar da kyamara maimakon haka.
Yana gyara matsakaicin matsayi na lanƙwasawar kai a kwance. Wannan karkacewar a kwance ba a ba da shawarar ta ba; idan zai yiwu ka matsar da kyamara maimakon haka.
settings.headTilt.horizontalOffset.label: Karkacewar sigifa a kwance
settings.headTilt.horizontalRange.descri: Yana sarrafa yawan lanƙwasawar kai zuwa hagu ko dama da ake buƙata don isa gefen allo.
Matsayin lanƙwasawar kai a kwance da ke motsa sigifa daga gefe ɗaya na allo zuwa ɗaya.
Yawan lanƙwasawar kai zuwa hagu da dama da ake buƙata don isa gefen allo.
Yawan lanƙwasawar kai zuwa hagu ko dama da ake buƙata don isa gefen allo.
settings.headTilt.horizontalRange.label: Matsayin lanƙwasawa a kwance
settings.headTilt.verticalOffset.descrip: Yana gyara matsayin sigifa lokacin da kyamara ta ga kai na kallon gaba kai tsaye.
Yana gyara matsakaicin matsayi na lanƙwasawar kai a tsaye.
settings.headTilt.verticalOffset.label: Karkacewar sigifa a tsaye
settings.headTilt.verticalRange.descript: Yana sarrafa yawan lanƙwasawar kai sama ko ƙasa da ake buƙata don isa gefen allo.
Matsayin lanƙwasawar kai a tsaye da ake buƙata don motsa sigifa daga sama zuwa ƙasa na allo.
Yawan lanƙwasawar kai sama da ƙasa da ake buƙata don isa gefen allo.
Yawan lanƙwasawar kai sama ko ƙasa da ake buƙata don isa gefen allo.
settings.headTilt.verticalRange.label: Matsayin lanƙwasawar tsaye
settings.language.description: Zaɓi harshen da ake so don fuskar Tracky Mouse.
settings.language.description.alt1: Yana canza harshen da Tracky Mouse ke bayyana da shi.
settings.language.label: Harshe
settings.mirror.description: Yana nuna hoton kyamara a madubi a kwance.
settings.mirror.label: Madubi
settings.motionThreshold.description: Ƙaramin tazara da sigifa za ta iya motsawa a kowane hoto (frame), a ma'aunin pixel. Yana taimakawa wajen tsayar da sigifa gaba ɗaya.
settings.motionThreshold.description.alt: Za a yi watsi da motsin da ya gaza wannan tazarar a pixel.
Saurin da ake buƙata a pixel/frame don motsa sigifa.
settings.motionThreshold.label: Matsayin motsi
settings.openCameraSettings.description: Yana buɗe taga saitunan tsarin kyamara da aka zaɓa domin daidaita abubuwa kamar auto-focus da auto-exposure.
Buɗe taga saitunan tsarin kyamararka don daidaita haske, bambanci da sauransu.
Yana buɗe taga saitunan tsarin kyamararka domin daidaita abubuwa kamar auto-focus da auto-exposure.
settings.openCameraSettings.label: Buɗe saitunan kyamara
settings.pointTracking.acceleration.desc:
Yana sa sigifa ta yi motsi cikin sauri idan motsin kai ya yi sauri, kuma ta rage sauri idan motsin ya yi sannu a hankali.
Yana taimaka wa sigifa ta kasance da kwanciyar hankali. Duk da haka, idan ana amfani da bin diddigin maki tare da lanƙwasawar kai, ƙaramar daraja na iya aiki mafi kyau saboda lanƙwasawar kai na tafiya a layi, kuma kana so bin diddigin maki ya kusan dacewa da bin diddigin kai domin daidaitawa ta kai tsaye.
Hanzari mai yawa yana sa sigifa ta yi saurin motsi idan kai ya motsa da sauri, ta yi nisa ɗan hankali idan motsin kai ya yi sannu a hankali.
Yana sa sigifa ta yi gaggawar motsi idan kai ya yi saurin motsi, kuma ta yi motsi a hankali idan motsin kai ya yi sannu a hankali. Wannan yana taimaka mata ta zauna mai kwanciyar hankali.
settings.pointTracking.horizontalSensiti: Saurin motsawar sigifa da ya dogara da motsin kai a kwance.
settings.pointTracking.smoothing.label: Santsi
settings.pointTracking.verticalSensitivi: Saurin motsawar sigifa da ya dogara da motsin kai a tsaye.
settings.runAtLogin.description: Idan an kunna wannan, Tracky Mouse zai fara aiki da kansa lokacin da ka shiga kwamfutarka.
settings.runAtLogin.description.alt1: Yana sa Tracky Mouse ya fara aiki da kansa lokacin da ka shiga kwamfutarka.
settings.runAtLogin.label: Gudana lokacin shiga
settings.sections.clicking.label: Danna
settings.sections.cursorMovement.label: Motsin sigifa
settings.sections.general.label: Gabaɗaya
settings.sections.pointTracking.label: Bin diddigin maki
settings.sections.video.label: Bidiyo
settings.soundEffects.description: Yana buga sauti lokacin da kuka danna.
settings.soundEffects.label: Tasirin sauti
settings.startEnabled.description: Idan an kunna wannan, Tracky Mouse zai fara sarrafa sigifa da zarar an kunna shi.
settings.startEnabled.description.alt1: Yana sa Tracky Mouse ya fara aiki da zarar an kunna shi. Idan ba haka ba, za ka iya kunna shi da kanka idan ka shirya.
settings.startEnabled.description.alt2: Yana sa Tracky Mouse ya kasance a kunne da zarar an kunna shi.
settings.startEnabled.description.alt3: Yana kunna Tracky Mouse da kansa da zarar an fara shirin.
settings.startEnabled.label: A kunna shi daga farawa
settings.swapMouseButtons.description:
Yana sauya maɓallan linzamin hagu da dama.
Yana da amfani idan an riga an sa maɓallan linzamin kwamfuta suyi sauyin wuri a tsarin kwamfutarka.
Hakanan za a iya amfani da shi don yin danna dama tare da danna na tsayawa (dwell) a lokaci na gaggawa.
settings.swapMouseButtons.label: Sauya maɓallan linzamin kwamfuta
settings.tiltInfluence.description:
Yana haɗa tsakanin amfani da bin diddigin maki (2D) da kuma gano lanƙwasawar kai (3D).
- A 0% zai yi amfani da bin diddigin maki kaɗai. Wannan yana motsa sigifa ne gwargwadon motsin maki na 2D a fuska a cikin hangen kyamara, don haka yana amsawa ga juyawar kai da motsawa gaba da baya.
- A 100% zai yi amfani da lanƙwasawar kai kaɗai. Yana amfani da kimanta inda fuska take a sararin 3D, yana watsi da motsawar kai gaba da baya. Ana santsi da wannan, don haka ba ya da saurin amsa kamar bin diddigin maki. A wannan yanayin ba lallai ne ka sake tsakiya ta hanyar tura sigifa zuwa gefen allo ba.
- Tsakanin haka zai yi kama da daidaitawa ta atomatik, yana gyara bin diddigin maki a hankali domin ya dace da lanƙwasawar kai. Wannan yana rage saurin motsawar sigifa da ke kaucewa wurin da ake tsammani bisa lanƙwasawar kai, kuma (sama da 80% a kan zamewa) yana motsawa a hankali zuwa wurin.
settings.tiltInfluence.description.alt1: Yana tantance ko motsin sigifa ya dogara ne da lanƙwasawar kai a 3D, ko kuma motsin fuska na 2D a cikin hoton kyamara.
settings.tiltInfluence.label: Tasirin lanƙwasawa
ui.desktopAppPromo.message: Za ka iya sarrafa dukkan kwamfutarka ta amfani da manhajar tebur ta TrackyMouse.
video.errors.accessFailed: Wani abu ya lalace wajen samun dama ga kyamara.
video.errors.accessFailedRetry: Wani abu ya lalace wajen samun dama ga kyamara. Don Allah ka sake gwadawa.
video.errors.cameraInUse: Ana amfani da kyamarar yanar gizo a wani wuri. Ka tabbata babu wani shiri da ke amfani da kyamara sannan ka sake gwadawa.
video.errors.noCameraFound: Ba a sami kyamara ba. Don Allah ka tabbata an haɗa kyamara kuma an kunna ta.
video.errors.permissionDenied: An ƙi izini. Don Allah ka kunna damar amfani da kyamara.
video.errors.previouslySelectedUnavailab: Kyamarar da aka zaɓa a baya ba ta samuwa. Gwada zaɓar "Default" a Video > Camera source, sannan ka zaɓi takamaiman kyamara idan kana buƙata.
video.errors.retryAfterClosingOtherProgr: Ka tabbata babu wani shiri da ke amfani da kyamara sannan ka sake gwadawa.
video.errors.unsupportedResolution: Kyamarar yanar gizo ba ta goyan bayan ƙudurin da ake buƙata ba. Don Allah ka canza saitunanka.
video.status.accessTakingLongerThanExpec: Samun damar amfani da kyamara yana daukar lokaci fiye da yadda aka zata...
